# The Future of Solid Rocket Motor Manufacturing: Raising the Bar on Quality, Reliability, and Throughput

The Solid Rocket Motor (SRM) industry is mission-critical to maintaining the Arsenal of Democracy, ensuring the United States and its allies are equipped to deter and respond to threats globally. Yet, as we've seen in recent conflicts, the current SRM industrial base has fallen behind, unable to keep pace with soaring domestic and international demand for critical weapons systems.
